Name: %SCRIPTPATH% 慢任务监控
TargetConfig:
{"ScriptContent":"import subprocess, sys, time
start = time.time()
result = subprocess.run(["python", "%SCRIPTPATH%"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=%TIMEOUTSEC%)
elapsed = time.time() - start
print(f"EXIT: {result.returncode}  ELAPSED: {elapsed:.1f}s")
print(result.stdout)
if result.stderr: print(result.stderr, file=sys.stderr)
sys.exit(result.returncode)
","PythonExecutable":"python","TimeoutSeconds":%TOTALTIMEOUT%,"SuccessExitCodesText":"0"}
